---
title: "Start Here"
subtitle: "What the Commercial Intelligence Lab is, and how to move through it"
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Start Here <span class="sep">›</span> Overview
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**This page orients you.** It explains what the lab is, what is validated versus not, and the fastest
route in for your role.
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-grade-c no-dot">v0.1 · Hypothesis stage</span>
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">Nothing here is validated yet</span>
<span class="pc-next">[Read the Product Brief](product-brief.qmd)</span>
:::
:::

The Commercial Intelligence Lab turns the Sigmoid Analytica CRM proposal into a **decision system**:
a place where our commercial strategy is broken into concrete decisions, scored with transparent
frameworks, and held to an explicit standard for what counts as evidence. You are not browsing
documentation — you are moving through a workflow.

## The mental model

Everything on this site serves one loop. Read it left to right:

::: {.lifecycle}
<li><span class="stage"><span class="num">1</span>Decisions</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage"><span class="num">2</span>Evidence</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage"><span class="num">3</span>Frameworks</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage"><span class="num">4</span>Dashboards</span></li>
<li><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="stage is-loop"><span class="num">5</span>Recommendations</span></li>
:::

We start from a **decision**, ask what **evidence** bears on it, score it with a **framework**,
explore it in a **dashboard**, and only then — when evidence is strong enough — reach a
**recommendation**. The [Working Paper](../working-paper/index.qmd) is the long-form discussion behind
these steps; it supports the workflow, it does not lead it.

## What is validated, and what is not

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Read this before trusting any number.** Every score, ranking, and figure on this site is computed
from **synthetic sample data** and carries confidence grade **C or D**. Nothing is a validated market
fact. The source proposal is treated as **Hypothesis v0.1** — it can *raise* a hypothesis, never
*validate* one. See [Claims & Confidence](../evidence/claims-confidence.qmd) for the live status of
every claim.
:::

## Choose your path

::: {.cil-cards}
::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Investor / Operator</div>
<h3>See the thesis under test</h3>
<p>Understand the pitch, the decisions in play, and where the evidence stands today.</p>
::: {.path-route}
<span class="step is-start">Home</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Product Brief</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Decisions</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Dashboards</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Current Status</span>
:::
<span class="card-go">Start with the Product Brief</span>
[](product-brief.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Investor path: Product Brief"}
:::

::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Product / Commercial</div>
<h3>Work the decisions</h3>
<p>Open the decisions, adjust the framework weights, and track what evidence would move each one.</p>
::: {.path-route}
<span class="step is-start">Home</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Decisions</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Frameworks</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Dashboards</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Evidence Register</span>
:::
<span class="card-go">Start with the Decisions</span>
[](../decisions/index.qmd){.stretched-link aria-label="Product path: Decisions"}
:::

::: {.cil-card}
<div class="card-kicker">Research / Data Science</div>
<h3>Inspect the machinery</h3>
<p>Read the governing standard, the evidence model, the frameworks, and the tests that guard them.</p>
::: {.path-route}
<span class="step is-start">Home</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">CIS</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Evidence</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Frameworks</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Tests</span><span class="arw">→</span><span class="step">Working Paper</span>
:::
<span class="card-go">Start with the CIS</span>
[](../cis/commercial-intelligence-specification.md){.stretched-link aria-label="Research path: CIS"}
:::
:::

## In this section

- [Product Brief](product-brief.qmd) — what we built, in one read.
- [How to Use This Lab](how-to-use.qmd) — the workflow, confidence grades, and common tasks.
- [First Evidence Sprint](first-evidence-sprint.qmd) — the first real fieldwork: run interviews, log
  evidence, review claims.
- [Current Status](current-status.qmd) — where the three decisions stand right now (live).
